commits.author: Thembelihle
commits.message: Feature - Refactor ManagerInboxScreen to enhance alert processing by adding meeting end time calculations and archiving logic, improving the relevance of alerts displayed to managers.

commits.author: Thembelihle
commits.message: Feature - Update ManagerLeaderboardScreen to support comparison of managers, enhancing data stream handling and UI messaging based on selected context.

commits.author: Thembelihle
commits.message: Feature - Refactor ManagerLeaderboardScreen to improve time filter handling, streamline data stream management, and enhance UI layout by removing redundant header elements and adding a filters bar.

commits.author: Thembelihle
commits.message: Feature - Enhance ManagerLeaderboardScreen with inline stat chips for displaying employee metrics and refactor metric text handling for improved readability.

commits.author: Thembelihle
commits.message: Feature - Refactor ManagerLeaderboardScreen to replace manager terminology with employee, updating data streams and UI elements accordingly.

commits.author: Thembelihle
commits.message: Feature -  Update badge awarding logic to include admin role alongside manager for improved badge celebration handling.

commits.author: Thembelihle
commits.message: Feature - Add recent activity trend visualization and update latest actions display in the progress visuals screen, enhancing user insights into recent activities and actions taken.

commits.author: Thembelihle
commits.message: Feature - Add activity filters to the progress visuals screen, allowing users to customize their view based on selected time periods.

commits.author: Thembelihle
commits.message: Feature - Refactor admin progress view to enhance supervision capabilities, including detailed activity summaries and breakdowns, while improving loading states and UI responsiveness.

commits.author: Thembelihle
commits.message: Feature - Refactor progress visuals screen to implement a personal view for admin users, enhancing goal tracking and insights while improving layout and responsiveness.

commits.author: Thembelihle
commits.message: Refactor progress visuals screen to consolidate goal status and engagement sections, improving layout responsiveness and updating growth indicator calculations for better trend analysis.
